originalTitle: 3 Trump Moves That Shook Markets This Week
summary: In the 2nd week of July, Trump’s Iran escalation, Spain trade threat and Russia sanctions shift drove fresh moves across global markets.
content: In the 2nd week of July, Trump’s Iran escalation, Spain trade threat and Russia sanctions shift drove fresh moves across global markets.
chineseTitle: 特朗普本周震撼市场的 3 项举措
chineseSummary: 7月第二周，特朗普的伊朗升级、西班牙贸易威胁和俄罗斯制裁转变推动了全球市场的新走势。
chineseContent: 7月第二周，特朗普的伊朗升级、西班牙贸易威胁和俄罗斯制裁转变推动了全球市场的新走势。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
